mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO NXCRM_MEMBER_TAG (ID, NAS_OUID, TAG_CODE, TAG_VALUE_CODE, TAG_VALUE, SHOP_ID, STATUS, BATCH_NO, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME)
SELECT #{item.id}, #{item.nasOuid}, #{item.tagCode}, #{item.tagValueCode}, #{item.tagValue}, #{item.shopId}, #{item.status}, #{item.batchNo}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP FROM DUAL
